title: Restrict views on columns as well as be able to lock columns simultaneously

posts.author: Natasha.Duggal (Natasha)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Restrict views and lock columns simultaneously as currently, you are only able to do one of these actions on a column, not both together.

What are you trying to achieve

Locking columns is important when formula based to avoid fat-fingering when you have multiple users of the board. Furthermore, when sharing the board to non-members you may likely want to hide certain columns/data from view, hence the overlap in ability to do both.

posts.author: dsnicc (Andrii)
posts.cookedHtml: Thats useful! Also when you connect some boards between each other you can hide unnecessary ones while still maintaining the lock feature for columns like links, dates, connections etc.

posts.author: mattzx11 (Matthew Haines)
posts.cookedHtml: My team is getting ready to launch the Monday Service for our ticketing system. Being the owner and manager of the group I would like to be able to create restrictions at a board level as well as a view level.
